metadata.title: Scope Creep Tracker — Detect & Manage Scope Changes
metadata.description: Free open-source scope creep tracker for freelancers and agencies. Detect scope changes, track time, generate change request PDFs.

landing.heroTitle: Stop Scope Creep Before It Eats Your Profit
landing.heroSubtitle: Track tasks, log client messages, detect out-of-scope work automatically. Generate professional change request PDFs. Free, open-source, 100% client-side.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Protect Your Projects
landing.feature1Desc: Automatically detect when tasks go beyond the original project scope using smart heuristic analysis.
landing.feature2Desc: Built-in timer and manual time entry to track exactly how long each task takes.
landing.feature3Desc: Generate professional change request documents ready to send to your clients.
landing.feature4Desc: Log and flag client messages that introduce scope changes or new requirements.
landing.feature5Desc: Monitor budget burn rate and see how scope creep affects your project profitability.
landing.feature6Desc: All data stays in your browser. No accounts, no servers, no tracking. 100% client-side.
landing.step1Desc: Set up your project with tasks, budget, and timeline. Define what's in scope from the start.
landing.step2Desc: Log time entries and client messages as you work. Keep everything organized in one place.
landing.step3Desc: The system analyzes your tasks and messages to flag potential scope creep automatically.
landing.step4Desc: Export professional PDF change requests with a clear summary of out-of-scope work and costs.

dashboard.title: My Projects
dashboard.emptyState: No projects yet. Create your first project to start tracking scope creep.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This action cannot be undone.
